visual_description: A man with long, dark hair and a leather jacket stands in the center of a crowd of people in a dimly lit, outdoor setting. He has a distressed expression and appears to be speaking or shouting. The people around him are dressed in dark, rugged clothing and look on with serious or concerned expressions.
audio_description: A low, guttural growl or roar is heard, followed by a sharp, high-pitched sound, possibly a scream or a whistle.
